preview_text: The dinner panic costs more than you think — but there's a way out
body_hook: Every week, $25 disappears from your grocery budget without a transaction. No receipt. No memory of spending it. Just food that was supposed to become dinner, going into the trash instead.
body_problem: You shop right. You buy real ingredients, make a plan in your head on the drive home, and mean every bit of it. Then Tuesday happens. The spinach is still in the bag. The chicken thighs are a day from the trash. The kids are asking what is for dinner and the answer is cereal again. The groceries and the dinner plan never connected.
body_agitate: The average family throws away $1,336 of groceries every year. That is $111 every single month — not from eating out, not from splurging, just from food that was supposed to become dinner and never did. That is a car payment. That is a back-to-school budget. That is the vacation fund that never quite materializes. It happens 52 weeks a year, silently, one bag of spinach at a time.
body_solve: easyChef Pro closes that loop. Point your phone at what is in your fridge. See exactly what to make tonight from what you already bought. No guessing. No waste. Fridge to table in thirty minutes.
body_value: The grocery budget goes where you planned it. $111 back in your pocket every month — not from coupons, not from meal kit subscriptions — just from actually using what you already own. The food you bought gets eaten. The money you budgeted stays yours.
body_proof: Tested across 10,000 real households before a single family paid for it. The average family saves $1,336 a year. 69.5% less food waste.
body_cta: Stop the invisible $111 monthly drain — lock in $7.99 forever and get your grocery budget back.
role: Hook — subject line stops the scroll
full_email_body:
Every week, $25 disappears from your grocery budget without a single extra purchase. No splurge. No emergency. It shows up as the spinach that went bad, the chicken that expired Thursday, the yogurt nobody touched. Quietly. Repeatedly. That's $111 a month — $1,336 a year — leaving before dinner gets decided.

It's not that you're spending more. You're wasting what you already bought, because nothing connects your fridge to your dinner plan. No app bridges that gap. So the gap keeps costing you.

easyChef Pro closes that connection. Scan your receipt. The app tracks every item, every expiry date, and builds dinner around what needs to be used first. The invisible drain stops.

Founding price: $7.99 a month, locked forever. First 5,000 families only — after that, $19.99.

Claim your founding spot — stop the $111 leak before the window closes.
